hero.subhead: Find your driving school from 4,848 schools across Italy. Enrol online, no queues.
hero.mascotNote: For all license types, not just category B
hero.trust: Trusted by 12,000+ students across 14 regions. Secure payments via PayPal, Apple Pay and Google Pay.

howItWorks.heading: Three moves. Then you're on the road.

1.title: Find your school
1.description: Explore the map, filter by region, choose your school and you're all set

2.title: Enrol online
2.description: Fill in, pay, and get driving in less than 2 months!

3.title: You're enrolled.
3.description: Confirm your enrolment online. The school will contact you to book your first appointment.

whyDigital.heading: Everything you need to get your licence, in one place.

1.title: Do everything online
1.body: Enrol in your driving school completely online. Fill in the form, upload your documents and pay — without ever setting foot in the office.
1.imageAlt: young person scanning document with phone

3.title: Official Quizzes
3.body: Official Ministry quizzes, in your browser or app, with analytics on your weak topics. Practise in the 5 minutes between classes.
3.imageAlt: student studying on phone in cafe

4.title: Deadlines you can't forget.
4.body: Pink sheet, exams, licence renewal dates — one timeline that pings you via email and WhatsApp.

b2b.heading: Your driving school goes digital!
b2b.body: Claim your driving school profile and start receiving online enrolments. Free dashboard to get started.

1.a: Yes, finding and contacting a driving school is completely free. You only pay the enrolment fee directly to the school you choose.

2.q: What documents do I need to start?
2.a: ID, codice fiscale, medical certificate (uploaded after the visit), one digital ID photo. We ask one at a time, not all at once.

4.a: Yes. Your data is GDPR-compliant, stored on European servers, encrypted at rest and in transit.

1.quote: I did the whole thing from bed, in pyjamas, in half an hour. My mum couldn't believe it.
1.name: Sofia, 18 — Milan

2.quote: I paid, but he did everything. First time I didn't have to go to the school office.
2.name: Cristina, 47 — Bologna

3.quote: I switched my Romanian licence to an Italian one without speaking Italian once. The English support saved me.
3.name: Andrei, 29 — Roma

finalCta.heading: Ready to drive?
finalCta.subhead: Find your driving school in 30 seconds. No account, no email, no commitment.

footer.brandDescription: The platform digitalising Italian driving schools. Students, schools, admin — all online.

placeholders.title: We're building this page
placeholders.subtitle: Check back soon to discover all the latest from Patentedigitale.it

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

server.title: Something went wrong
server.desc: We're working on it. Please try again in a moment.

hero.subhead: Find your driving school and enrol from your phone. No queues, no admin office, no stress.
hero.paypalNote: Available at verified driving schools with online payments active.

flow.heading:
From home: enrolment and payment.
At the school: everything else.

items.1: Search and pick your driving school.
items.3: Pay, in instalments if you want.

docs.heading:
Upload documents from your phone.
Even with the camera.
docs.body: If you want to get ahead, you can upload documents during enrolment. Passport photo with the phone camera, ID and codice fiscale scanned. If you prefer to bring them to the school on day one, that's fine too.

1.title: Passport photo
1.body: Snap it straight from your phone camera.

2.title: ID document
2.body: Front and back. A phone photo works too.

3.title: Codice fiscale
3.body: A photo of your tax-ID card.

4.title: Extra documents, if needed
4.body: For minors: a parent's ID. For non-EU citizens: permesso di soggiorno.

docs.note: Uploading documents online is optional. You choose between doing it from home or at the school.

paypal.heading: In one go, or in 3 instalments.
paypal.body: With PayPal Pay in 3, split your enrolment cost into three monthly instalments. No interest, no hidden fees.
paypal.caveat: Available only at verified driving schools with online payments active.

cta.heading: Ready to start?
cta.subhead: Find your driving school now. No account, no email required.

bundles.heading:
See everything before you enrol.
Clear pricing, no surprises.
bundles.body: Each driving school configures its own packages. You see what's included, what it costs, and pick what fits you. No need to walk into a school office to find out.
bundles.note: Illustrative example. Packages and prices vary by school.

mock.paypalNote: Pay in full or in 3 instalments with PayPal

hero.headline: Your driving school is already on Patentedigitale.
hero.subhead: Claim it in minutes and start receiving enrolments directly in your dashboard.

dashboard.heading: A dashboard that works for you.
dashboard.subhead: Enrolments, profile, data export. All in one place.

primary.title: Online enrolments straight to you.
primary.body: Students pick you on the site, complete the enrolment, and you find it in the dashboard. No missed calls, no paper forms to file.

1.title: Profile already online
1.body: Your driving school is likely already in our database. Claim it and update your details.

2.title: Export everything, anytime
2.body: Your students, your data. CSV export in one click.

auto.label: Automatic claim
auto.description: If your business email matches a domain already in our database, you're in on first login. No manual verification.

manual.label: Manual claim
manual.description: Upload P.IVA and an official document. We verify within ~2 business days and contact you to activate the dashboard.

pricing.heading: Start free. You pay only when you earn.

today.label: Today
today.description: Claim your profile, receive enrolments. No cost to be on Patentedigitale.

transaction.label: On online enrolments
transaction.description: Only when a student enrols and pays online through the platform. No enrolment, no commission.

pricing.note: The model will evolve. We're defining future plans with advisors and partner schools. We'll let you know before any change.

cta.heading: Ready to digitalise your driving school?
cta.subhead: Find your profile, claim it, start receiving online enrolments.

payments.heading:
The student pays in 3 instalments.
You get the full amount right away.
payments.body: Even when the student picks PayPal Pay in 3, you receive the full enrolment amount as soon as the transaction is verified. PayPal carries the instalment risk, not you.

hero.subhead: This is a preview of the enrollment page. You're seeing sample bundles a driving school can offer on patentedigitale.it. You can't complete enrollment from here yet.
hero.caveatBody: Licence data, prices and vehicles shown are illustrative. When enrolment goes live, you'll see real data configured by the school.

bundles.heading:
Pick the bundle
that fits you.
bundles.body: Each driving school configures its own bundles. You see exactly what's included, how much it costs, and choose what you need.
bundles.note: Illustrative example. Bundles and prices vary by school.
bundles.paypalNote: Pay in full or in 3 installments with PayPal

detail.bundlesCaveat: Example · each driving school configures its own bundles.

whatsappGate.hint: Log in or sign up to contact the driving school on WhatsApp.

1.title: Pick the bundle
1.body: Compare Essential, Complete and Plus. See what each includes and choose the one that fits you.

2.title: Fill out the form
2.body: Enter your details and upload documents from your phone. No printing, no queues at the office.

3.title: Pay (also in 3 installments)
3.body: Pay in full or in 3 installments with PayPal. Zero interest, zero hidden fees.

picker.heading: Pick the licence you want.
picker.subhead: Select a licence to see price, what's included, and vehicles available.
picker.noVehicles: Vehicles not specified. Ask the school directly.
picker.paypalNote: Pay in 3 instalments with PayPal at verified schools.
picker.mockNote: Example data. The page will show real data when the school configures it.
picker.extraHoursHint: Add driving lessons (on top of the mandatory ones).

guest.heading: Create your account to enrol
guest.body: To enrol at {{name}} you need a student account. Takes a minute.

autoscuola.heading: Sign in as a student
autoscuola.body: You're signed in as a driving school. To enrol in a course you need a student account. Sign out and create a student account to continue.
autoscuola.primaryCta: Sign out and sign in as student

student.heading: Almost there. Payment preview.
student.body: The payment flow is in construction. When live, you'll complete enrolment right here with card or PayPal (even in 3 instalments).
